category_sources: source_facts.description says libpsl is a C library for the Public Suffix List; official reference manual describes Public Suffix List library functions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libpsl; official reference manual is titled Libpsl Reference Manual.
docs_sources: Official libpsl reference manual is published at rockdaboot.github.io/libpsl and provides API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rockdaboot/libpsl, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names the Public Suffix List C library; official reference manual documents libpsl public suffix functions.
